Table of Contents

Enum esriDataConverterError

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Data converter error codes.

[Guid("7B7294FB-F4BA-11D1-AAAB-00C04FA33C20")]
public enum esriDataConverterError

Fields

E_DATACONVERTER_ACQUIRESCHEMALOCKFAILED = 22032

22032: Acquiring the schema lock failed for the output featuredataset.

E_DATACONVERTER_CANCELLED = 22029

22029: Data conversion canceled.

E_DATACONVERTER_CANNOT_CREATE_FEATURE_DATASET = 22034

22034: Open the input datasetname failed.

E_DATACONVERTER_CREATEFEATURECLASSFAILED = 22021

22021: The operation could not create an output featureclass.

E_DATACONVERTER_CREATETABLEFAILED = 22022

22022: The operation could not create an output table.

E_DATACONVERTER_ERROR_DELETING_PARQUET_FILE = 22038

22038: Error in deleting Google BigQuery Parquet file.

E_DATACONVERTER_ERROR_LOADING_PARQUET_FILE = 22037

22037: Error in loading Google BigQuery Parquet file.

E_DATACONVERTER_ERROR_READ_ALL_ROWS = 22036

22036: Error in reading all rows from the source.

E_DATACONVERTER_ERROR_READ_ROWS = 22035

22035: Error in reading some rows from the source.

E_DATACONVERTER_FLUSHINSERTCURSORFAILED = 22031

22031: Flush the insert cursor failed.

E_DATACONVERTER_INSERTCURSORFAILED = 22028

22028: Could not open insert feature cursor.

E_DATACONVERTER_INVALID_INPUT_DATASET_NAME = 22033

22033: Open the input datasetname failed.

E_DATACONVERTER_MATCHINPUTFIELDSETFAILED = 22030

22030: The input Featureclass fields and the Output fields do not match.

E_DATACONVERTER_OPENCURSORFAILED = 22026

22026: Could not open feature cursor.

E_DATACONVERTER_OPENFEATURECLASSFAILED = 22017

22017: Cannot open Featureclass.

E_DATACONVERTER_OPENFEATUREDATASETFAILED = 22019

22019: Cannot open feature dataset.

E_DATACONVERTER_OPENFEATUREWORKSPACEFAILED = 22020

22020: Cannot open feature workspace.

E_DATACONVERTER_OPENINSERTCURSORFAILED = 22027

22027: Could not open an insert cursor.

E_DATACONVERTER_OPENTABLEFAILED = 22018

22018: Cannot open table.

E_DATACONVERTER_UNLOADFAILED = 22025

22025: Cannot unload the feature class.

E_DATACONVERTER_WRITEFEATURESFAILED = 22023

22023: Could not write features to the output featureclass.

E_DATACONVERTER_WRITEROWSFAILED = 22024

22024: Could not write rows to the output table.

S_DATACONVERTER_OK = 0

0: Successful conversion.

Made with docfx
